name: Bret Taylor
title: Co-founder & CEO, Sierra
titleHistory: Former co-CEO of Salesforce · CTO of Meta · Chair of the OpenAI board
motif: a glowing map-pin and a heart-shaped like sigil
introLine: I drew the maps, raised the castles, and set out again. Now — what would you ask of me?
sealLine: You have inscribed all my teachings. Take my seal, apprentice.

name: Wes Kao
title: Co-founder, Maven
titleHistory: Co-founded altMBA with Seth Godin · Co-founder of Maven
motif: a shimmering quill with crystalline words spiraling around it and a seal carved from organizational charts
introLine: Words move companies. Master the subtle craft of delivery, and rooms will move for you.
sealLine: You've mastered the craft of delivery. Now go — lead with your words.
